name: Hyper VA
explanation: A modern hypersaw virtual-analog polyphonic synthesizer with eight voices. Each voice stacks seven detuned band-limited saws into a supersaw plus a square sub an octave down, runs them through a bright resonant 4-pole low-pass driven by its own envelope, then an amplitude envelope. Detune thickens the saw stack, Spread fans it across a huge stereo field, and the bright digital filter opens into shimmering trance leads and pads. Controls: Detune, Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Spread, Attack, Release, Level.
